title: 20w14∞ Improvements
description: Welcome to The Ultimate Content Update! However this datapack changes it a bit. Makes it a challenge!
body:
Welcome to The Ultimate Content Update! However this datapack changes it a bit. With default settings the datapack spawns you in the libary dim. If you die you respawn here. It also prevents you from entering the overworld & nether, but the end works fine. Turns out the funky portals can go to the overworld, nether, and end. I tell you the phrases when you join. So that means you can beat the ender dragon with this datapack, but you haft to go thru random dimentions you have no control over to find the materals to get a book & quil, as well as gear. Making the datapack quite fun, and it also works for servers if you edit the settings in the op menu. You also get some new advancements to bring new challanges. Anyway, i play tested it, it gives a good description of other things it does in game. Enjoy!


```
/trigger intro
```
 - gives a introduction into the datpack, you also get the introduction when you first join. Has lots of useful hints, and a list of features & changes. 



```
/trigger op_menu
```
 - See and edit the settings for this datapack, there is lots of useful ones. Only works for op's in creative mode. Has settings like enable/disable overworld, end, and nether. Being stuck in the libary dim is turned off. Among other things. You need to edit the settings to make the datapack playable in multiplayer, but its setup perfect for singleplayer.
